requirement.description: When the headlight state changes, the BCM shall transmit the updated headlight status on the CAN bus.

test_cases.title: Verify Headlight_Status = 0 when OFF
test_cases.precondition: Ignition ON; Headlight switch OFF; Monitor CAN ID 0x100
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_hl_001_off(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_bcm_messages(can_bus, 1.0)
    assert len(msgs) >= 5, 'Insufficient BCM messages'
    assert all(get_headlight_status(m.data) == 0 for m in msgs)

test_cases.title: Verify Headlight_Status = 2 for Low Beam
steps: Set headlight switch to Low Beam

test_cases.title: Verify immediate transition to High Beam
